name: OPD Patient Search
description:
As a receptionist
  I want to search for OPD patients by name or ID
  So that I can quickly find their records

steps.name: the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist
the user is on the OPD page

elements.name: Search for an OPD patient (Valid and Invalid)

steps.name: the user types "maria" into the OPD search box
the patient table should display "The single record for Patient ID "Maria""

result.error_message:
java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "org.openqa.selenium.WebDriver.manage()" because "this.driver" is null
	at actions.OPD_SearchActions.verifySearchnameResult(OPD_SearchActions.java:33)
	at definitions.OPD_SearchDefinitions.the_patient_table_should_display_patient_records_containing_the_name_maria(OPD_SearchDefinitions.java:51)
	at ✽.the patient table should display "The single record for Patient ID "Maria""(file:///E:/SmartHospital/Automation-Testing-Project/src/test/resources/features/opd/Search.feature:15)

steps.name: the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist
the user is on the OPD page

elements.name: Search for an OPD patient (Valid and Invalid)

steps.name: the user types "XYZ999" into the OPD search box
the patient table should display "A "No data available in table" message"

name: Add New OPD Patient (User Story 4.2)
description:
As a receptionist
  I want to add new patients to the OPD system
  So that their visits can be tracked

steps.name: the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist
the user is on the "OPD - Out Patient" page

elements.name: Add a new OPD patient successfully (Valid Case)

steps.name: the user clicks the "Add Patient" button
the user fills the Add Patient form with the following details:
clicks the "Save" button
a "Record Saved Successfully" message should appear
the patient "Jane Doe" should be visible in the OPD list
the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist
the user is on the "OPD - Out Patient" page

elements.name: Fail to add patient with missing required fields (Invalid Case)

steps.name: the user clicks the "Add Patient" button
the user leaves the mandatory "Patient Name" field blank
clicks the "Save" button
the system should highlight the "Patient Name" field with an error
the patient record should not be created

name: Add Prescription (User Story 4.6)
description:
As a doctor or admin
  I want to add prescriptions to an OPD visit
  So that the patient knows what medication to take

steps.name: the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a doctor
the user is viewing an existing OPD patient profile

elements.name: Add multiple medicines to a prescription

steps.name: the user clicks the "Add Prescription" button
adds the following medications to the prescription list:
clicks "Save"
the prescription should be saved successfully
the medications should be visible under the "Prescription" tab

name: Filter OPD Patients (User Story 4.3)
description:
As a receptionist
  I want to filter the OPD list by specific criteria like the Consultant Doctor
  So that I can organize the patient list easily

steps.name: the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist
the user is on the "OPD - Out Patient" page

elements.name: Filter patients by Consultant Doctor

steps.name: the user selects "Sonia Bush" from the "Consultant" filter dropdown
clicks the "Search" button in the filter bar
the resulting table should only show patients assigned to "Sonia Bush"
the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist
the user is on the "OPD - Out Patient" page

elements.name: Filter patients by Consultant Doctor

steps.name: the user selects "Amit Singh" from the "Consultant" filter dropdown
clicks the "Search" button in the filter bar
the resulting table should only show patients assigned to "Amit Singh"

name: Move OPD to IPD (User Story 4.5)
description:
As a hospital administrator
  I want to transfer an OPD patient to the In-Patient Department (IPD)
  So that they can be admitted to a ward

steps.name: the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist
the user is on the "OPD - Out Patient" page

elements.name: Successfully move a patient from OPD to IPD

steps.name: the user opens the profile of an existing OPD patient
the user clicks the "Move to IPD" button
fills in the admission form with the following details:
clicks the "Save" button
a success message should be displayed
the patient should now appear in the "IPD - In Patient" module

name: OPD Payment (User Story 4.8)
description:
As a receptionist
I want to collect and record payments from OPD patients
So that hospital billing is accurate

steps.name: the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist
the user is viewing an OPD patient with a pending balance

elements.name: Make a valid OPD payment

steps.name: the user clicks the "Add Payment" button
enters "500" in the "Amount" field
selects "Cash" as the "Payment Mode"
clicks the "Save" button
a "Payment Successful" message should appear
the patient's "Paid Amount" should increase by 500
the "Balance Amount" should decrease by 500
the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist
the user is viewing an OPD patient with a pending balance

elements.name: Attempt to make a payment with an invalid amount

steps.name: the user clicks the "Add Payment" button
enters "-50" in the "Amount" field
clicks the "Save" button
the system should display a validation error "Amount must be valid"
the payment should not be processed

name: Download OPD Report (User Story 4.4)
description:
As a receptionist or patient
  I want to download OPD visit reports
  So that I can have a physical or digital copy of the bill/details

steps.name: the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist
the user is on the "OPD - Out Patient" page

elements.name: Download a patient's OPD bill report

steps.name: there is an OPD patient with a completed visit
the user clicks the "Show" icon for that patient
navigates to the "Visits" tab
clicks the "Print" icon on a specific visit record
a print preview should open
the user should be able to save the report as a PDF

name: Show OPD Patient Details (User Story 4.7)
description:
As a hospital worker
  I want to view the full details and history of an OPD patient
  So that I have full context of their treatment

steps.name: the user is logged into the Smart Hospital portal as a receptionist
the user is on the "OPD - Out Patient" page

elements.name: View all tabs in the patient details view

steps.name: the user clicks the "Show" (eye icon) button for a patient
the patient profile should open displaying the following tabs:
the basic patient details (Name, Age, Blood Group) should be visible at the top
